name: Rosaria, the Stately Fallen Angel
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>凛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ローザリアン
name_jp_tl: Rosarian, the Great Stately Demon Angel
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 2 Level 7 or higher Plant-Type monsters (1 from your hand and 1 from your Graveyard). Once per turn: You can negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field, until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 2 Level 7 or higher Plant-Type monsters (1 from your hand and 1 from your Graveyard). Once per turn: You can negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field, until the end of this turn.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 2 Level 7 or higher Plant-Type monsters (1 from your hand and 1 from your Graveyard). Once per turn: You can negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field, until the end of this turn.

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
